div1.entryFree:
Bob, vb., 1) to move in a short, jerking manner: when she drinks, against her lips I b. Mids. II, 1, 49.
2) to drub, to thump: beaten, --ed and thumped, R3 V, 3, 334. I have --ed his brain more than he has beat my bones, Troil. II, 1, 76.
3) to get cunningly: gold and jewels that I --ed from him, as gifts to Desdemona, Oth. V, 1, 16. you shall not b. us out of our melody, Troil. III, 1, 75.
